probes.name: delegation-migrations-applied
probes.description: role_delegations + impersonation_sessions tables exist with the expected column set. Fails startup if schema is out of date.

probes.name: delegation-resolver-cache-reachable
probes.description: Redis LRU cache for DelegationResolver reachable. Failure falls through to DB reads — degraded performance but no data loss.

probes.name: delegation-permissions-seeded
probes.description: All 11 permissions from permissions.json exist in the roles/permissions table for both sanctum + platform_admin guards. Missing permissions block authorization.

probes.name: delegation-scheduled-jobs-registered
probes.description: ActivateDelegationsJob + ExpireDelegationsJob + EndImpersonationSessionsJob + PurgeRevokedDelegationsJob + PurgeImpersonationSessionsJob are registered in the schedule. Any missing → the lifecycle guarantee breaks.

probes.name: delegation-active-impersonations-within-cap
probes.description: Count of active impersonation_sessions across the platform is below the operational cap (default 50 concurrent). A large excess signals either an ExpireImpersonationSessionsJob outage OR abuse — both are pageable.
probes.reference: The cap is deliberately conservative — no operational scenario should produce 50+ concurrent Academorix-staff impersonation sessions.

probes.name: delegation-stuck-pending-count
probes.description: Count of pending delegations whose starts_at is > 1h in the past (should have activated). > 0 signals an ActivateDelegationsJob outage.

probes.name: delegation-stuck-expired-count
probes.description: Count of active delegations whose ends_at is > 1h in the past (should have expired). > 0 signals an ExpireDelegationsJob outage.

probes.name: delegation-stuck-active-impersonations
probes.description: Count of active impersonation_sessions whose ends_at is > 15 minutes in the past. > 0 is CRITICAL — impersonation session TTL enforcement has failed. Fires PagerDuty alert.

probes.name: delegation-token-scrub-lag
probes.description: Count of ended impersonation_sessions with session_token_hash still populated AND ended_at > 30 days ago. > 0 signals a PurgeImpersonationSessionsJob outage. Not critical (the tokens are dead), but must be resolved before compliance review.
